General.Name: Tenfu Cayman Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Tenfu (Cayman) Holdings Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a traditional Chinese tea-product company. The company operates through Tea Leaves, Tea Snacks, and Tea Ware segments. It sells and markets various tea products; and develops product concepts, tastes, and packaging designs. The company offers 1,300 varieties of traditional Chinese tea-leaf products; 400 varieties of tea snacks; and tea ware. It sells its products primarily under the Tenfu, Tenfu Ten Xin, and Uncle Lee brands. The company sells tea products in retail outlets and retail points, autonomous regions, and municipalities in the People's Republic of China, which include stores with shop fronts at street level; and shopping malls and concession counters in the department stores and hypermarkets. It also is involved in the classification and packaging of tea leaves; manufacture and sale of tea snacks; catering management; beverage production; sale of pre-packaged food; sale of liquor and tea drink; property management activities; and provision of hotel, restaurant, tourist, ticket sales from tea museums, and other ancillary services. Further, the company sells tea leaves, tea snacks, and tea ware through internet. Tenfu (Cayman) Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Xiamen, the People's Republic of China.
